response:
## Focus management
Implement a focus trap: Tab cycles within the dialog, Shift+Tab reverses.
## Semantics
Use role="dialog" with aria-modal="true" and aria-labelledby="dialog-title".
WCAG 2.1.1, 4.1.2.
```html
<dialog aria-modal="true"></dialog>
```
## Breadcrumb
Use aria-current="page" on the current breadcrumb item to identify the active page to screen readers.
